subcodes.first_line: Should one tarry, after the Beloved hath called forth through the tongue of His Own Manifestation, saying: "Hasten with your hearts unto..." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هل ینبغی الوقوف بعد الذی ینادی المحبوب بلسان مظهر نفسه ان اسرعوا بالقلوب الی
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @prayer for teaching, @call to action, @the power of words; of speech
